ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "major1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first major of the student */,
  "major2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second major of the student */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the student resides */,
  "fav_restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the favorite restaurant of the student */,
  "fav_movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the favorite movie of the student */,
  "has_iphone" INTEGER /* Whether the student has an iPhone */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Grade point average of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic adviser */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major2_id FOREIGN KEY ("major2_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major1_id FOREIGN KEY ("major1_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_fav_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("fav_restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_fav_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("fav_movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the major */,
  "min_credits_required" INTEGER /* Minimum credits required to complete the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the major */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact person for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college offering the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official department website */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact person for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the college */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official college website */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dean of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colleges_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official restaurant website */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_name" TEXT /* Name of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled in the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the student started the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the student completed the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_programs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits earned by completing the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES student_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room where the course is offered */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the course can accommodate */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES program_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled in the course */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course offering */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance record */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date when the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Securely stored password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
